title: The Torrent
writer: Wallace Clifton, Philip D. Hurn, George Rix
actors: Eva Novak, Elita Proctor Otis, Jack Perrin
plot: Velma is unhappily married to millionaire roué Sam Patton. Aboard his yacht bound for the South Seas, Sam pays more attention to his guests than to his wife, and she flees when he attempts to force liquor on her. A sudden paralyti...
